PropertyTypes.Caption: Lower bound attribute
PropertyTypes.Description: The lower bound value on the slider

PropertyTypes.Caption: Upper bound attribute
PropertyTypes.Description: The upper bound value on the slider

PropertyTypes.Caption: Lower bound tooltip type
PropertyTypes.Description: By default tooltip shows current value. Choose 'Custom' to create your own template.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Upper bound tooltip type
PropertyTypes.Description: By default tooltip shows current value. Choose 'Custom' to create your own template.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Tooltip always visible
PropertyTypes.Description: When enabled tooltip is always visible to the user

PropertyTypes.Caption: Number of markers
PropertyTypes.Description: Marker ticks on the slider (visible when larger than 0)

PropertyTypes.Caption: Decimal places
PropertyTypes.Description: Number of decimal places for marker values

PropertyTypes.Caption: Orientation
PropertyTypes.Description: If orientation is 'Vertical', make sure that parent or slider itself has fixed height

type.WidgetDescription: Change range of values using a slider
